Quentin Tyrell was a knight of House Tyrell during the reign of Aerys II Targaryen. He was a cousin of Lord Mace Tyrell.[2] He has one son, Ser Olymer Tyrell.[1]

History[ ]

Quentin died at the Battle of Ashford during Robert's Rebellion.[2]
